title: HealthifyMe is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: HealthifyMe is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
HealthifyMe invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HealthifyMe:
HealthifyMe is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HealthifyMe!
